title: qereb #7130
definition:
1) midst, among, inner part, middle
    1a) inward part
        1a1) physical sense
        1a2) as seat of thought and emotion
        1a3) as faculty of thought and emotion
    1b) in the midst, among, from among (of a number of persons)
    1c) entrails (of sacrificial animals)
